title: ICAI Announces Expected Date for Intermediate and Foundation January 2026 Examination Results
content:
# ICAI Announces Expected Date for Intermediate and Foundation January 2026 Examination Results

Ek important update hai Chartered Accountancy aspirants ke liye! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne January 2026 mein conduct kiye gaye Intermediate aur Foundation Examinations ke results ki likely declaration date announce ki hai.

Here's what you need to know:

*   **Announcement Date:** The official announcement regarding the result declaration date was made on March 2, 2026.
*   **Expected Result Date:** Intermediate and Foundation Examination results are likely to be declared by the afternoon of March 8, 2026.
*   **How to Check Results:** Candidates can access their results online on the official ICAI website, `icai.nic.in`. You will need to enter your Registration Number along with your Roll Number to view your scorecard.

Toh, apni login credentials ready rakhiye!

## Read the Official Document
* [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/new_announcements.html)

*Published on: 3 March 2026*
